The '''H-L Block ion drive''' was an [[Ion engine/Legends|ion engine]] that was designed and manufactured by [[Arakyd Industries/Legends|Arakyd Industries]].

Due to the already high energy signature of the [[Helix-class light interceptor|''Helix''-class light interceptor]] for which the H-L Block was originally built for, no heat or emissions-baffling protocols were included in the schematics. This meant that even if not installed on a Helix-class interceptor, a ship that was equipped with H-L Block engines would be very easy to detect for any surveillance station operator.
